response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience (web, embedded-adjacent, D/C++ exposure) but lacks the core requirements for this role: native-level Japanese proficiency is not indicated, recent C/UNIX kernel work is absent, and there is no demonstrated experience with embedded LAN-switch security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP) or Linux kernel source modification.
strengths: Long, diverse software engineering background across multiple languages and domains
Some low-level/systems exposure via DLang, C/C++ at National Instruments, and Linux audio work
Demonstrated ability to learn new stacks and lead technical workshops
concerns: No evidence of Japanese language proficiency (hard requirement)
No recent C/UNIX or Linux kernel modification experience
No exposure to switch security stack: MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP, chip-vendor SDKs

key_factors.factor: Limited recent C and Linux kernel work
